name: Cheesecake Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cream cheese, egg, 1/3 cup sugar, and 1 teaspoon vanilla in a bowl. Beat until light and fluffy.
2. Spread the mixture over the bottom of the unbaked pie shell.
3. Arrange pecan halves on top of the cream cheese mixture.
4. In another bowl, mix the remaining eggs, 1/4 cup sugar, corn syrup-light, and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla until well combined.
5. Carefully pour the egg mixture over the pecans.
6. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 to 45 minutes, or until set.
